content:
The conversation before the meeting often matters as much as the meeting itself. This session builds the easy, natural English that opens doors and turns brief introductions into lasting professional relationships.

## What you'll learn
- Starting and ending conversations gracefully — no awkward silences, no abrupt exits
- Talking about your work without rambling or underselling
- Following up after events so connections stick and convert to real opportunities
- Navigating dinners, cocktail hours, and conferences with ease and genuine confidence

## Who it's for
Professionals who feel capable in formal English but freeze in unscripted social moments where the relationship building actually happens.
title: Confident Small Talk & Networking
